metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.description: Detects multi-stage ransomware indicators on retail endpoints: mass file encryption events, shadow copy deletion processes, and outbound C2 connections to IPs in RetailIOCWatchlist. Correlates DeviceFileEvents, DeviceProcessEvents, DeviceNetworkEvents. MITRE T1486.
properties.query:
// ============================================================
// RetailShield — Ransomware Indicator Detection Rule
// MITRE ATT&CK : T1486 — Data Encrypted for Impact
// Tactic       : Impact
// Severity     : Critical
// Frequency    : Every 5 minutes | Lookback: 30 minutes
// Author       : Tanvir Farhad — ShieldTech Ltd, London
// Reference    : M&S supply-chain ransomware attack (2025) — £300M impact
// ============================================================

let LookbackPeriod    = 30m;
let MassRenameThresh  = 100;   // file renames within the lookback window
let BeaconThresh      = 20;    // outbound connections to a single external IP

// ── IOCs from Sentinel watchlist ────────────────────────────────────────────
let RansomwareIOCs = (
    _GetWatchlist("RetailIOCWatchlist")
    | where Type in ("IP", "Domain", "Hash")
    | project IOCValue = tolower(Value), IOCType = Type
);

// ── Step 1: Mass file rename / encryption staging ────────────────────────────
let MassFileRename =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where ActionType in ("FileRenamed", "FileCreated")
    | where isnotempty(FileName)
    | extend
        OriginalExtension = tolower(tostring(split(PreviousFileName, ".")[-1])),
        NewExtension      = tolower(tostring(split(FileName, ".")[-1]))
    | where OriginalExtension != NewExtension                         // extension changed
        and NewExtension !in ("tmp", "bak", "log", "lnk", "ini")    // exclude benign
    | summarize
        RenameCount    = count(),
        SampleFiles    = make_set(FileName, 5),
        AffectedFolders = dcount(FolderPath)
        by DeviceId, DeviceName, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
    | where RenameCount >= MassRenameThresh
    | extend ThreatSignal = "MassFileRename";

// ── Step 2: Shadow copy deletion commands ────────────────────────────────────
let ShadowCopyDeletion =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (
        "vssadmin delete shadows",
        "vssadmin.exe delete",
        "wmic shadowcopy delete",
        "wbadmin delete catalog",
        "bcdedit /set recoveryenabled no",
        "bcdedit /set bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures",
        "diskshadow /s",
        "Get-WmiObject Win32_ShadowCopy"
    )
    | project
        Timestamp,
        DeviceId,
        DeviceName,
        AccountName,
        InitiatingProcessFileName,
        ProcessCommandLine,
        ThreatSignal = "ShadowCopyDeletion";

// ── Step 3: Known ransomware process names ────────────────────────────────────
let RansomwareProcesses =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where FileName has_any (
        "ryuk", "conti", "lockbit", "blackcat", "alphv",
        "revil", "sodinokibi", "darkside", "blackmatter",
        "hive", "clop", "maze", "egregor", "ragnar"
    )
    | project
        Timestamp,
        DeviceId,
        DeviceName,
        AccountName,
        InitiatingProcessFileName,
        ProcessCommandLine,
        ThreatSignal = "KnownRansomwareProcess";

// ── Step 4: C2 beacon — high-frequency connections to single external IP ─────
let C2Beaconing =
    DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where ActionType == "ConnectionSuccess"
    | where isnotempty(RemoteIP)
    | where RemoteIP !startswith "10."
        and RemoteIP !startswith "192.168."
        and RemoteIP !startswith "172."
        and RemoteIP != "127.0.0.1"
    | join kind=inner (RansomwareIOCs | where IOCType == "IP")
        on $left.RemoteIP == $right.IOCValue
    | summarize
        BeaconCount   = count(),
        FirstSeen     = min(Timestamp),
        LastSeen      = max(Timestamp)
        by DeviceId, DeviceName, RemoteIP, RemotePort
    | where BeaconCount >= BeaconThresh
    | extend ThreatSignal = "C2BeaconToRansomwareIP";

// ── Step 5: Union all signals and surface alerts ──────────────────────────────
union
    (MassFileRename    | extend ProcessCommandLine = "", AccountName = "", RemoteIP = ""),
    (ShadowCopyDeletion | extend RenameCount = 0, SampleFiles = dynamic([]), AffectedFolders = 0, RemoteIP = "", BeaconCount = 0),
    (RansomwareProcesses | extend RenameCount = 0, SampleFiles = dynamic([]), AffectedFolders = 0, RemoteIP = "", BeaconCount = 0),
    (C2Beaconing        | extend ProcessCommandLine = "", AccountName = "", InitiatingProcessFileName = "", RenameCount = 0, SampleFiles = dynamic([]), AffectedFolders = 0)
| extend
    AlertSeverity    = "Critical",
    MitreTechnique   = "T1486",
    MitreTactic      = "Impact",
    PlaybookTrigger  = "isolate_endpoint",
    RiskScore        = 100
| project
    Timestamp,
    DeviceName,
    DeviceId,
    AccountName,
    ThreatSignal,
    ProcessCommandLine,
    RenameCount,
    SampleFiles,
    AffectedFolders,
    RemoteIP,
    BeaconCount,
    AlertSeverity,
    MitreTechnique,
    MitreTactic,
    PlaybookTrigger,
    RiskScore
| order by Timestamp desc
